# CATALOG-AI RAW DATA SOURCE: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ilyastas/katalog-ai/refs/heads/main/llms.txt
# Katalog-AI Data Protocol
Schema: (INDEX, GEO, CAT, URL, TAGS, DATE)

All data is contained in the filename. Files are empty.
